---
title: "Week 13: Interpreting the Call"
subtitle: "Chapter 20"
date: "2026-11-17"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Two full sessions on interpretation: effect sizes, power, honest discussion writing, and avoiding pitfalls.

**Reading:** Chapter 20

## Key Concepts

- Effect sizes: Cohen d, r, R-squared, eta-squared
- Statistical power
- Exploratory vs. confirmatory analysis
- HARKing
- Alternative explanations
- Writing discussion sections
- Common interpretation pitfalls

## Learning Objectives

1. Calculate and contextualize effect sizes
2. Understand statistical power
3. Distinguish exploratory from confirmatory analysis
4. Write a nuanced discussion section

## Assignment: Inferencing Data [R] (100 pts)

State hypothesis, select appropriate test, run it, report in APA format, interpret, calculate effect size.
